titleStmt.title: SII 23.150: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 150. (A.R. No. 150 of 1907.) Pūvālaikkuḍi, Tirumayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District Śiva temple—on the west wall of the same shrine Jat. Sundara-Pāṇḍya (?): year 17

summary.p: This is a record of Jaṭāvarman Sundara-Pāṇḍya whose identity is not clear. This registers the appointment of three persons, Prakaṭagaṇḍaṉ Mārāyaṉ and his two brothers Śōṟaṉ and Bhūmaṉ as uvachchar for providing music daily in the temple at Pūvālaikkuḍi in Vaḍapaṟṟu (northern section ?) of Ponnamarāpadi-nāḍu, and an endowment of land in perpetuity for their maintenance by the temple authorities and the ūrār of Kōvaṉūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śrīmaṟkiktikkumel koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkara vattikaḷ śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟ
ku yāṇṭu 10 7vatu kāttikai mātam poṉṉamarāpatināṭṭu vaṭapaṟṟu Uṭaiyār tiruppūvālaikkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil cipaṇṭā
rattārom kovaṉūr Ūrāyicainta Ūromum kuḻaiñcānāṉa pira kaṭakaṇṭamārāyaṉukkum Ivaṉ tampi coṟuṉu
kkum pūmaṉukkum Uvaiccakkāṇiyāka kalveṭṭikkuṭutta paricāvatu Ik koyilukkum Ūrukkum Inneṭu
nāḷmutal Innāḷvaraiyāka Oru kāṇiyāḷareṉṟu Oruvaraik kāṇāta paṭiyāle Innāḷmutal pirakaṭakaṇṭa
mārāyaṉum Ivaṉ tampimār coṟuṉum pūmaṉum Immūvaṟkum Uvaic cakkāṇiyāka cantirātittavaṟ celvatā
kavum tāṉveṇṭiya kuṭi kāṇpikka kaāriyaṅkaḷukku Uri Urittāvu tākavum
Ippaṭikku Ikkāṇi Anupavikkummiṭattu Ivvūrkaḷil perunāṉkellaik kuḷpaṭṭa nancey puñcaikaḷilum muṉpilā
ṇṭu peṟum peṟu peṟukaḷ peṟṟu Ikkoyilu muṉpilāṇṭu peṟum cukantiraṅkaḷum (pe)
peṟṟu Ikkoyil tevaikku Oru Uvaiccukku Innāyaṉār tevatāṉam pakaiccavar kālapparaiyaṉ
kuṭikkāṭu kuḷamum vayalum puñcaikaḷum Anupavittu Oru nāḷum muṭ ṭāmal tevaiyaṟukka kaṭavaṉāka Ippaṭi
cammatittu kuḻaiñcāṉ pirakaṭakaṇṭamaārāyaṉukkum Ivaṉ tampi coṟaṉukkum pūmaṉāṉa muḻutum vallamā
rāyaṉukkum kāṇiyāka kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tiruppūvālaik kuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār ko
yil cipaṇṭārattāromum kovaṉūr Ūrāyicainta Ūromum Ip paṭikku Ūrpaṭṭaṉ mutaliyār Eḻuttu
tirunāvukkaracu periyanāyanār Eḻuttu maṟamāṇikkappaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu tirunilaiyaḻakiyāṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku kovaṉūr Ūravar sajñā taṉmaiyum keṭṭu Ippiramāṇam Eḻutiṉeṉ Innāṭṭu vaṭa pa
ṟṟukkaṇakku Āḷyāṇṭāṉ tirumeṉiyaḻakiyārāṉa periyaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.150 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
